quiz.question:
There is one move, and one move only, to draw this game. 

Which is it?

feedback.text: Great move! The g7-square is pivotal: if ...Kf2, Qd4+, if ...Kf1, Qa1+. The king cannot escape the checks. If the king goes elsewhere on the g- or h-files, it's easier to check it because the queen is already on a diagonal with access to those files.
What's the only square from which you make sure you can give endless checks?
